sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52802" key="kaloerge/tis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰλο-εργέτις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n52802.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">doing good</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ψυχή</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg004:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Antr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">30</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
